UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF HOWARD WESTON'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 3 (TO CLARIFY WITH RESPECT TO PRIMARY RESIDENCE). RESPONSES SHALL BE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 27, 2013.PLAITFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,172.50 AND SHALL BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BY DEFENDANT WITHIN 60 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. COURT SIGNED ORDER IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TOMMY ABIB's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication To Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint.

This matter is off calendar due to dismissal of all parties and all causes of action, filed February 19, 2014. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

And Motion To Compel Further Responsesto Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Saul M. Ferster, Esq., (415-863-2678) for Howard Weston Trustee of the Howard Weston, 1981 Living Trust, Plaintiff and moving party.
William E. Shapiro, Esq., Law Offices of William Shapiro (415-628-9209) for Tommy Abib, aka Khalid Abib, Defendant and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PLAINTIFF HOWARD WESTON's Motion To Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories is GRANTED. Defendant shall provide supplemental responses to Special Interrogatories 3 (to clarify with respect to primary residence). Responses shall be received by Plaintiff's counsel no later than September 27, 2013.Plaitff's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $2,172.50 and shall be paid to Plaintiff's counsel by defendant within 60 days of Notice of Entry of Order. Court signed order in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

And Motion To Compel Further Responsesto Form Interrogatories

MINI MINUTES: No Appearances, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF HOWARD WESTON's Motion To Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories is Continued to September 18, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition to department 501 no later than September 11, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: Mars Goodman, Not reported. (D501)
